CustomField.description: Finer-grained lead source value (Inbound MQL, Outbound BDR, Partner Referral, Customer Referral, Event, Content Download, Trial Signup, etc.). Backed by Northstar_Lead_Source_Detail GVS — complements (does not replace) the standard LeadSource picklist.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The specific origin of the lead (e.g. "Trial Signup"). Standard LeadSource stays at the coarser bucket; this drives attribution reporting.
CustomField.label: Lead Source Detail
